name: Lifeslide
short_description: Embark on a daring journey through life and master the skill of paper plane flight. Explore colorful worlds with unique challenges, find secrets and unlock your full potential!
detailed_description:
This is a story about life. Who's life and what it means is up to you. Dive deep to find your meaning of each level or simply enjoy an atmospheric experience - this is your journey and you decide what to make of it.

BE WARNED:

Underneath the serene looks lies a flight mechanic that requires mastery! Learn how to gather and preserve your momentum, use the terrain to your advantage and react quickly. Beneath the simple controls, there's a blend between physics and arcade gameplay that will get under your skin as you get better.

Choices Matter!

Finding the right balance in life can be sometimes tough and Lifeslide is no exception. Along your journey, you will constantly be presented with two main choices - Time or Matter. You need both to keep going and your choices will define how you progress!

Unlock Planes and Appearances!

Collect plane parts to unlock new planes, each with a unique style of flight - find what works best for you and utilize it to its full extent. Find secret places and complete achievements to unlock colorful appearances customizations. 

Music

Music is a big part of the Lifeslide experience. Along the way, an original score with electronic, rock and orchestral elements will keep you company. As you fly seamlessly between levels, the music will gradually transition to capture the vibe!

Competitive play

Each week a new challenge emerges, requiring players to fly fast and close to objects. How fast you can fly depends only on your skill. And for the speedrunners, Lifeslide offers a dedicated leaderboard with an accurate in-game timer!

Zen Mode

Revisit your favorite moments in an endless loop. Toggle randomization to get new experiences unseen in Story. This mode is for those who are looking to drift off and relax without pressure.

Passionate Community

Lifeslide has a small but passionate community which is always ready for a challenge.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Bulgarian
